name: Cuentas Inc.
business: Cuentas Inc. provides integrated communications, entertainment, and lifestyle services through a mobile-first platform, operating in mobile telecommunications (via 51% ownership of World Mobile LLC) and entertainment media distribution (via 51% ownership of World Mobile Media Group LLC). The company sells mobile voice, text, data, and VPN-enabled connectivity, as well as premium entertainment content including live events and on-demand programming. Its target customers are consumers, particularly Hispanic and Latino communities in the U.S., and it also serves international subscribers through partnerships like Hallo 015 in Israel.
sellsTo: international subscribers via Hallo 015 in Israel

exposures.sentence: Through its 51% ownership of World Mobile LLC, Cuentas integrates existing and emerging technologies to deliver reliable and unique mobile services, including voice, text, data, VPN-enabled connectivity, and next-era communications solutions.

These Fintech Assets, which include the Company's legacy prepaid card, digital wallet and related financial technology platform and associated intellectual property but exclude all MVNO-related telecommunications assets, were placed into escrow with a third-party law firm pending Mr. De Prado's exercise of an option right associated with one of his secured promissory notes.

Through its 51% ownership of World Mobile Media Group LLC, Cuentas is building a decentralized media platform which we hope will combine licensed and original content, live events, creator-generated content, and socially impactful programming that drives both fan engagement and mobile subscribers.

World Mobile's hybrid system enables local operators to deploy small AirNode access points that connect end-users to the internet, while larger backbone nodes perform authentication and routing functions, with all traffic and revenue sharing recorded on a blockchain-based infrastructure.

catalysts.event: Expected start of live marketing and active inscriptions of entertainment services
catalysts.sentence: Cuentas expects to expand penetration into the mobile service markets and start live marketing and active inscriptions of the entertainment services during 2026-Q2.

catalysts.event: Conversion of World Mobile Group Ltd. convertible note into common stock
catalysts.sentence: On February 25, 2026, World Mobile Group Ltd. (WMG) converted promissory notes of Cuentas, Inc. in the principal amount of $260,000 into 1,277,018 shares of the Company's common stock, representing approximately 18.5% of the Company's outstanding shares of common stock.

catalysts.event: Entry into securities purchase agreement with P.W. Janssen
catalysts.sentence: On February 26, 2026, the Company entered into a Securities Purchase Agreement with P.W. Janssen, pursuant to which the Company issued and sold to Janssen 714,286 shares of common stock and a five-year warrant to purchase up to 714,286 additional shares for aggregate gross proceeds of $300,000.
